info.name: Qubaati - Logical AI Mission To PDF Flow
info.description: الفلو المنطقي للمنتج: إنشاء ولي أمر وطفل، إضافة بيانات الطالب، إنشاء عالم ومهام Default، إكمال 4 مهام لفتح التخصيص، أخذ AI_GENERATED mission من available missions، حلها، ثم تحميل PDF. إذا AI غير متاح، الكود عندكم يستخدم fallback deterministic لكنه يبقى من نفس مسار AI_GENERATED.

exec: for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) { pm.environment.set("defaultMissionTitle" + i, "مهمة افتراضية " + i + " - الجسر " + r); }

body.raw:
{
  "username": "{{parentUsername}}",
  "email": "{{parentEmail}}",
  "password": "Password123",
  "fullName": "نورة العتيبي",
  "phoneNumber": "0551234566"
}

{
  "username": "{{studentUsername}}",
  "email": "{{studentEmail}}",
  "password": "Password123",
  "fullName": "فهد بن سعد العتيبي",
  "age": 11,
  "grade": "الصف الخامس الابتدائي",
  "classroomId": null
}

exec: function byName(key) { return skills.find(s => s.name === pm.environment.get(key)); }
const analysis = byName("skillAnalysisName"); const decision = byName("skillDecisionName"); const problem = byName("skillProblemName");
pm.test("skills found", function () { pm.expect(analysis).to.exist; pm.expect(decision).to.exist; pm.expect(problem).to.exist; });
const worlds = pm.response.json(); const world = worlds.find(w => w.title === pm.environment.get("worldTitle"));

exec: pm.test("default mission " + i + " found", function () { pm.expect(mission).to.exist; });
const generated = list.find(m => m.source === "AI_GENERATED" && m.active !== false);

item.name: 17 - Optional Generate Personalized Mission If None Exists

exec: pm.test("generate returns 2xx or already capped", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200,400]); });
if (pm.response.code === 200) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set("generatedMissionId", json.id); }
if (pm.response.code === 400) { console.log("Usually OK: completing the 4th default mission may already create 2 personalized missions."); }
pm.test("generated first choice exists", function () { pm.expect(c).to.exist; });

item.name: 21 - Submit Generated Mission Step 2 If Needed

exec: pm.test("step 2 submitted or skipped manually", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.within(200, 299); });
if (pm.response.code >= 200 && pm.response.code < 300) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.test("generated ready", function () { pm.expect(json.missionCompleteReady).to.eql(true); }); }
pm.test("pdf response is not empty", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.size().body).to.be.above(1000); });
console.log("Use Send and Download to save the PDF.");
